display_name: XK Theme - Safe Colors & Custom Background

high_findings.description: Attempt to read credential / key files

medium_findings.description: Publisher domain is NOT verified by Microsoft
Directory traversal paired with network send
Harvesting VSCode configuration and sending over network
medium_findings.code_snippet: workspace.getConfiguration("xk-theme").update("backgroundEnabled",!0,!0),{success:!0,message:"背景图已应用！请执行 Ctrl+Shift+P → Reload Window 重载窗口生效。"}}catch(e){const n=e;return"EACCES"===n.code||"EPERM"===n.

medium_findings.description: Programmatic tampering with workspace configuration settings
medium_findings.code_snippet: workspace.getConfiguration("xk-theme").update("backgroundEnabled",!0,!0),{success:!0,message:"背景图已应用！请执行 Ctrl+Shift+P → Reload Window 重载窗口生效。"}}catch(e){const n=e;return"EACCES"===n.code||"EPERM"===n.

info_findings.description: No domain associated with publisher profile
